title: Competency Inventory and Independent Evidence Ledger · Hiring Signal Forensics
summary: A realistic competency inventory and independent evidence ledger artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in competency-to-evidence ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate course, work, community, care, creative, and self-directed experience into observable role-relevant behaviors.
Rank claim evidence by authenticity, recency, independence, changed-case performance, stakeholder relevance, and inspectability.
Distinguish personal decisions and work from collaboration, templates, tutorials, automation, generative assistance, and reviewer input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh
steps.instruction:
Order the Evidence Refresh evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Evidence Refresh assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh, keep Evidence Refresh connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Evidence Refresh has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Evidence Refresh precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.

For Order the regression proof · Debug Evidence Refresh, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Old screenshots remain current evidence if the repository still exists.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the debug Evidence Refresh case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the debug Evidence Refresh case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the debug Evidence Refresh case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Evidence Refresh case

stimulus.title: Competency Behavior case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Translate course, work, community, care, creative, and self-directed experience into observable role-relevant behaviors.

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Translate course, work, community, care, creative, and self-directed experience into observable role-relevant behaviors. Artifact under review: competency-to-evidence ledger.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Competency Behavior, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Competency Behavior.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Evidence Refresh
steps.instruction:
Append a career-evidence-refresh-149cnf: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Evidence Refresh.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Evidence Refresh into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Evidence Refresh, keep Evidence Refresh connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.code:
career-evidence-refresh-149cnf:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Evidence Refresh
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Evidence Refresh: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The debug variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Evidence Refresh, keep Evidence Refresh connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.
